case_title: MARGARET TAN VS. K SUSAN SPIWAK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY TAN, MARGARET SPIWAK, K SUSAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,318.00 FILED BY TAN, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT SPIWAK, K SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SPIWAK, K SUSAN
